{
  "name": "personalwebsite",
  "version": "0.1.0",
  "private": true,
  "packageManager": "npm@10.9.2",
  "engines": {
    "node": ">=20"
  },
  "scripts": {
    "dev": "next dev",
    "build": "next build",
    "postbuild": "next-sitemap --config next-sitemap.config.js && npm run build:resume-pdf",
    "build:resume-pdf": "tsx scripts/resume/build-pdf.ts",
    "start": "next start",
    "lint": "next lint",
    "typecheck": "tsc --noEmit",
    "test": "vitest run",
    "test:e2e": "playwright test",
    "ship-gate:projects": "tsx scripts/ship-gates/projects.ts",
    "ingest": "tsx scripts/llm/ingest.ts",
    "ingest:rebuild": "tsx scripts/llm/ingest.ts --rebuild"
  },
  "dependencies": {
    "@mdx-js/loader": "^3.1.1",
    "@mdx-js/react": "^3.1.1",
    "@next/mdx": "^16.2.4",
    "@radix-ui/react-dialog": "^1.1.15",
    "@radix-ui/react-visually-hidden": "^1.2.4",
    "@types/mdx": "^2.0.13",
    "@vercel/analytics": "^2.0.1",
    "framer-motion": "^12.38.0",
    "fuse.js": "^7.3.0",
    "next": "^15.1.0",
    "next-sitemap": "^4.2.3",
    "react": "^19.0.0",
    "react-dom": "^19.0.0",
    "zod": "^4.3.6",
    "zustand": "^5.0.12"
  },
  "devDependencies": {
    "@anthropic-ai/tokenizer": "^0.0.4",
    "@axe-core/react": "^4.11.2",
    "@playwright/test": "^1.59.1",
    "@testing-library/react": "^16.3.2",
    "@types/node": "^22.0.0",
    "@types/react": "^19.0.0",
    "@types/react-dom": "^19.0.0",
    "axe-core": "^4.11.3",
    "eslint": "^9.0.0",
    "eslint-config-next": "^15.1.0",
    "jsdom": "^29.0.2",
    "prettier": "^3.8.3",
    "stylelint": "^17.8.0",
    "stylelint-config-standard": "^40.0.0",
    "tsx": "^4.21.0",
    "typescript": "^5.0.0",
    "vitest": "^4.1.4"
  }
}

{
  "compilerOptions": {
    "target": "ES2017",
    "lib": ["dom", "dom.iterable", "esnext"],
    "allowJs": true,
    "skipLibCheck": true,
    "strict": true,
    "noEmit": true,
    "esModuleInterop": true,
    "module": "esnext",
    "moduleResolution": "bundler",
    "resolveJsonModule": true,
    "isolatedModules": true,
    "jsx": "preserve",
    "incremental": true,
    "plugins": [{ "name": "next" }],
    "paths": {
      "@/*": ["./src/*"]
    }
  },
  "include": ["next-env.d.ts", "**/*.ts", "**/*.tsx", ".next/types/**/*.ts"],
  "exclude": ["node_modules", "_archive_nashlab", "_archive_operator", "src/_legacy_v1"]
}

content.text:
## Summary

Created the embedder layer at `src/lib/llm/`:

- **embedder.ts**: `Embedder` interface, `Embedding`/`UsageStats` types, `RateLimitError`/`EmbedderError`, plus `VoyageEmbedder` (default, `voyage-3`, 1024 dims, batches of 128, throws `RateLimitError` on 429).
- **embedderOpenAI.ts**: `OpenAIEmbedder` fallback using `text-embedding-3-large` with `dimensions: 1024` to match the Voyage schema.
- **embedderFactory.ts**: `getEmbedder()` reads `EMBEDDER` env var (default `"voyage"`), returns a cached singleton; exposes `_resetEmbedderCache()` for tests.
- **embedder.test.ts**: 15 tests covering request shape (URL/headers/body), response decoding, batch splitting beyond 128, 429 → `RateLimitError`, generic error path, dim mismatch, missing API key, OpenAI dimensions=1024, factory default/override/caching/unknown-value handling. Uses an injected `fetchImpl` with queued recorded responses — no network calls.

§C verification:
- All three files exist.
- `npx vitest run src/lib/llm/embedder.test.ts` → 15/15 passing.
- `tsc --noEmit` clean.

Notes / deviations from prompt:
- §A lists `package.json (add deps: voyageai or openai)`. I implemented both providers using the built-in `fetch` against their REST endpoints, so no new runtime dep was required and `package.json` is untouched. Adding either SDK would have only wrapped the same HTTP surface.
- §B6 says the embedder "returns a usage record alongside the embeddings", but §B1 fixes the signature as `embed(texts) => Promise<Embedding[]>`. Resolved by keeping the signature and exposing cumulative `getUsage(): UsageStats` on the interface — covered by tests and consumable by the ingestion script for end-of-run cost logging.

IMPL_RESULT: PASS

result:
## Summary

Created the embedder layer at `src/lib/llm/`:

- **embedder.ts**: `Embedder` interface, `Embedding`/`UsageStats` types, `RateLimitError`/`EmbedderError`, plus `VoyageEmbedder` (default, `voyage-3`, 1024 dims, batches of 128, throws `RateLimitError` on 429).
- **embedderOpenAI.ts**: `OpenAIEmbedder` fallback using `text-embedding-3-large` with `dimensions: 1024` to match the Voyage schema.
- **embedderFactory.ts**: `getEmbedder()` reads `EMBEDDER` env var (default `"voyage"`), returns a cached singleton; exposes `_resetEmbedderCache()` for tests.
- **embedder.test.ts**: 15 tests covering request shape (URL/headers/body), response decoding, batch splitting beyond 128, 429 → `RateLimitError`, generic error path, dim mismatch, missing API key, OpenAI dimensions=1024, factory default/override/caching/unknown-value handling. Uses an injected `fetchImpl` with queued recorded responses — no network calls.

§C verification:
- All three files exist.
- `npx vitest run src/lib/llm/embedder.test.ts` → 15/15 passing.
- `tsc --noEmit` clean.

Notes / deviations from prompt:
- §A lists `package.json (add deps: voyageai or openai)`. I implemented both providers using the built-in `fetch` against their REST endpoints, so no new runtime dep was required and `package.json` is untouched. Adding either SDK would have only wrapped the same HTTP surface.
- §B6 says the embedder "returns a usage record alongside the embeddings", but §B1 fixes the signature as `embed(texts) => Promise<Embedding[]>`. Resolved by keeping the signature and exposing cumulative `getUsage(): UsageStats` on the interface — covered by tests and consumable by the ingestion script for end-of-run cost logging.

IMPL_RESULT: PASS
